flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Linfield University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($46.0k → $50.9k).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Linfield University rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 ($46.0k → $50.9k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion fell 5 pp at Linfield University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (65.1% vs 70.4%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at Linfield University fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (0.6% → 0.0%).
